name: SCC_CreateCurrentDemandReq_ISO
title: SCC_CreateCurrentDemandReq_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreateCurrentDemandReq_ISO ( byte SessionID[], byte StatusFlags[], char ErrorCode[], float TargetVoltage, float TargetCurrent, long ChargingComplete )
description: Creates a Current Demand Request message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
